---
title: "Verification: PR3 Step 13a — Replay Round-Trip on Rockfish"
date: 2026-05-12
categories: [verification]
status: in-progress
branch: "fix/error-handling-pr3"
pr: 0
---

End-to-end validation of the `--replay` round-trip on Rockfish, per the Step 13a plan
(`nemascan-sims-nf-notes/Development/error-handling/phases/phase-1/step-13a/step13a-plan.qmd`).
The local checks (1–3) were validated on HEAD `946f730` and are referenced from
`pr3-local-validation-results.md` (V1–V13); this notebook covers the gating Rockfish checks (4–6).
Check 7 was descoped in the 2026-05-12 plan revision and is omitted here.

---

## Summary Checklist

Fill in the **Result** column as you work through each step.

| # | Step | Environment | Pass criterion | Result |
|---|------|-------------|---------------|--------|
| 0 | `NXF_VER=24.10.5` pinned | Rockfish | `nextflow -version` shows 24.10.x | [ ] |
| 1 | Stub-run with `--replay /dev/null` | local | exits 0; param accepted | [X] |
| 2 | Type-coercion smoke test | local | 1 slot selected; no ClassCastException | [X] |
| 3 | Missing replay-file guard | local | clear user-facing error, not NPE | [X] |
| S | Setup — baseline DB + `replay.tsv` on PR3 HEAD | Rockfish | pipeline exits 0; one failure trap; schema-valid `replay.tsv` | [ ] |
| 4 | Replay filter: only failed slot re-executes | Rockfish | siblings absent from log; prep tasks cached; `AGGREGATE_METADATA` re-runs | [ ] |
| 5 | DB slot cleanup: siblings preserved | Rockfish | 12 files/slot replaced; sibling reps/cells + marker dirs untouched | SKIPPED |
| 6 | Successful-replay idempotency | Rockfish | input `replay.tsv` byte-identical, no archival file produced | SKIPPED |

---

## 0. Prerequisites

```bash
#| eval: false
conda activate /data/eande106/software/conda_envs/nf24_env
export NXF_SINGULARITY_CACHEDIR=/vast/eande106/singularity
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
nextflow -version   # must show 24.10.x
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output"}
``` text
[paste output here]
```
:::

---

## Local Checks (reference)

Rockfish user: `rmckeow1`. PR3 branch: `fix/error-handling-pr3` at HEAD `946f730`
(merge commit `38f0fed` if the test-suite update is included).

Checks 1–3 were validated locally on `fix/error-handling-pr3` HEAD `946f730`.
Evidence is captured in `../pr3-local-validation-results.md` under markers V1–V13.

| Check | Result | Evidence |
|-------|--------|----------|
| 1 — Stub-run with `--replay /dev/null` | ✅ | V1–V4 |
| 2 — Type-coercion smoke test (1-slot fixture) | ✅ | V1; V12 (replay profile) |
| 3 — Missing replay file guard | ✅ | V2 / V3 / V4 — header, column, and row tokenization errors |

---

## Setup — Baseline DB + `replay.tsv` on PR3 HEAD

::: {.callout-warning title="Step 9a artifacts are NOT reusable"}
Commit `199ce25` (2026-05-01) added `species` to the failure-trap payload **and** to the trait/mapping hash signatures. A pre-species `replay.tsv` will fail the header assertion at `main.nf:230–232`, and a pre-species DB cannot be cleaned by `DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS` (it would compute new hashes, find no matching files, and silently no-op). Regenerate both artifacts on the PR3 HEAD before running checks 4–6.
:::

### S.1 — Inject a deterministic failure into `GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES` for `rep == 1`

The injection must be placed **after** `source ${projectDir}/bin/failure_trap.sh`
(currently `modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf:31`) so the EXIT trap is registered
before the failure fires.

```bash
#| eval: false
# In modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf, insert after line 31:
#     if [[ "${rep}" == "1" ]]; then exit 1; fi
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Diff applied"}
``` text
diff --git a/modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf b/modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf
index 42f8e36..8faeef2 100644
--- a/modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf
+++ b/modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf
@@ -30,6 +30,8 @@ process GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES {
     export NF_TRAP_PAYLOAD='{"session":"${workflow.sessionId}","task_hash":"${task.hash}","attempt":${task.attempt},"max_retries":${task.maxRetries},"species":"${species}","group":"${group}","maf":${maf},"nqtl":"${nqtl}","effect":"${effect}","h2":${h2},"rep":${rep},"mode":"NA","type":"NA"}'
     source ${projectDir}/bin/failure_trap.sh
 
+    if [[ "${rep}" == "1" ]]; then exit 1; fi
+
     gcta64 --bfile CV_TO_SIMS \\
          --simu-qt \\
          --simu-causal-loci ${causal_variants} \\
```
:::

### S.2 — Run the pipeline to populate the DB and produce `replay.tsv`

```bash
#| eval: false
export NXF_VER=24.10.5

OUTPUT=/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/pr3-step13a-baseline
mkdir -p ${OUTPUT}

nextflow run main.nf -profile test_hpc,rockfish \
    --reps 2 \
    --output_dir ${OUTPUT} \
    2>&1 | tee ${OUTPUT}/baseline.log

echo "--- Pipeline exit: $? ---"

# Snapshot mtimes of the freshly-populated DB so Check 5 can prove
# sibling preservation against this baseline.
find ${OUTPUT}/db -type f -printf '%T@\t%p\n' | sort > ${OUTPUT}/db-mtimes-pre.txt

# Verify the failure trap fired and replay.tsv was written under the new schema.
ls -lh ${OUTPUT}/.failures/*.json
echo "--- replay.tsv ---"
cat ${OUTPUT}/replay.tsv
echo "--- header columns (must include 'species') ---"
head -1 ${OUTPUT}/replay.tsv | tr '\t' '\n'
```

**Pass:**

- [X] Pipeline exits cleanly (`exit 0`); `GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES` for `rep == 1` retried `maxRetries + 1` times and the error was ignored per `errorStrategy = 'ignore'`.
- [X] `${OUTPUT}/.failures/c_elegans__<group>__<maf>__<nqtl>__<effect>__1__<h2>__NA__NA.json` exists.
- [X] `${OUTPUT}/replay.tsv` exists with one data row; header contains `session`, `species`, `group`, `maf`, `nqtl`, `effect`, `h2`, `rep`, `mode`, `type`, `exit`.
- [X] `VALIDATE_REPLICATION_COMPLETE` exits 0 with the `REPLAY_REQUIRED` warning (Step 9 behavior: short replication is non-fatal).
- [X] DB at `${OUTPUT}/db/` contains marker sets and genotypes for every group, mappings for all `rep != 1` cells, and nothing under the failed slot's `trait_id`.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — pipeline summary"}
``` text
Completed at: 12-May-2026 10:46:46
Duration    : 21m 57s
CPU hours   : 1.0 (0% failed)
Succeeded   : 48
Ignored     : 1
Failed      : 4
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — failure payload"}
``` text
{"session":"d8e2c31d-264e-4427-be54-e3a87613bf11","task_hash":"e79bdfc2d7bca124074e05db95325df1","attempt":4,"max_retries":3,"species":"c_elegans","group":"ce.hpc","maf":0.05,"nqtl":"5","effect":"gamma","h2":0.8,"rep":1,"mode":"NA","type":"NA","exit":1}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — replay.tsv"}
``` text
session	task_hash	attempt	max_retries	species	group	maf	nqtl	effect	h2	rep	mode	type	exit
d8e2c31d-264e-4427-be54-e3a87613bf11	e79bdfc2d7bca124074e05db95325df1	4	3	c_elegans	ce.hpc	0.05	5	gamma	0.8	1	NA	NA	1

```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — header columns"}
``` text
session
task_hash
attempt
max_retries
species
group
maf
nqtl
effect
h2
rep
mode
type
exit
```
:::

### S.3 — Revert the injection

```bash
git checkout -- modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf
git status --short modules/gcta/simulate_phenotypes/main.nf
```

### S.4 — Export `STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR` for checks 4–6

Run this in every new shell session before running checks 4–6. The bare prose
form (`Set STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=...`) is not enough — without `export`, the variable
will not be visible to subshells, and copy/pasted commands that reference
`${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}` will silently expand to an empty string. If you open a new
terminal or `ssh` back in, run this block again.

```bash
export STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/pr3-step13a-baseline
echo "STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}"
test -d "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db" && echo "OK: db directory present" || echo "FAIL: db directory missing"
test -f "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.tsv" && echo "OK: replay.tsv present" || echo "FAIL: replay.tsv missing"
```

Once Check 4 has been kicked off, also export the Nextflow run name for that
specific replay invocation. This directory has multiple historical pipeline runs
in `.nextflow/`, so `nextflow log` without an argument can return the wrong run —
always pass the run name explicitly. Run `nextflow log` (no args) inside
`${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}` to list all runs if you need to look the name up.

```bash
export STEP13A_REPLAY_RUN=<paste-run-name-here>   # e.g. cranky_volta
nextflow log "${STEP13A_REPLAY_RUN}" -f name,status | head -3
```

---

## Check 4 — Replay filter: only failed slot re-executes

The replay predicate at `main.nf:462` is keyed on the 6-tuple
`(species, group, nqtl, effect, h2, rep)`. `maf` is **not** a predicate key — it is
derived from `(group, maf)` via `read_marker_set_metadata()` inside `DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS`.
The filter sits *before* `PYTHON_SIMULATE_EFFECTS_GLOBAL`, so sibling slots are dropped
from the channel entirely (they do **not** appear as `CACHED` — they do not appear at all).

```bash
export NXF_VER=24.10.5
export STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/pr3-step13a-baseline

nextflow run main.nf -profile test_hpc,rockfish,replay -resume \
    --output_dir "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}" \
    --replay "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.tsv" \
    2>&1 | tee "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.log"
```

Note the **run name** that Nextflow prints at startup (e.g. `cranky_volta`). This
output directory has multiple historical Nextflow runs in `.nextflow/`, so
`nextflow log` without an argument will return *some* prior run — not necessarily
the replay. Pin every `nextflow log` invocation to the replay run name explicitly.

If you forgot to note the name, list all recorded runs in this directory and pick
the most-recent `SUCCEEDED` one (the rightmost columns are session id and command):

```bash
nextflow log
```

Then export the replay run name and inspect only that run:

```bash
export STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/pr3-step13a-baseline
export STEP13A_REPLAY_RUN=boring_volhard

nextflow log "${STEP13A_REPLAY_RUN}" -f name,status,hash | tee "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay-tasks.tsv"
nextflow log "${STEP13A_REPLAY_RUN}" -f name,status | awk '{print $1}' | sort -u > "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay-processes.txt"
```

**Pass criteria:**

- [X] Startup log contains `Replay mode: filtering channels to N slot(s) from …` where N matches the data-row count in `replay.tsv`.
- [X] `DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS` runs once and is `COMPLETED`.
- [ ] Prep-phase tasks (`BCFTOOLS_*`, `PLINK_*`, `GCTA_MAKE_GRM`, `R_*` marker-set helpers) are `CACHED`.
- [X] Post-fanout tasks (`PYTHON_SIMULATE_EFFECTS_GLOBAL`, `GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES`, `DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_TRAIT_DATA`) appear `COMPLETED` with a task count equal to N (one per replayed slot).
- [X] `GCTA_PERFORM_GWA` and `DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GWA_TO_DB` appear `COMPLETED` with task count `N × 4` (one per `mode × pca` mapping per slot).
- [X] **Sibling slots do not appear** in the log at all — neither `COMPLETED` nor `CACHED`. They are filtered out of the channel before fanout.
- [ ] `DB_MIGRATION_AGGREGATE_METADATA` re-executes (the new `meta.parquet` sidecars invalidate its `.collect()` input cache). - FAILED
- [X] `VALIDATE_REPLICATION_COMPLETE` exits 0 (replication is now complete; warnings on short replication are non-fatal per Step 9).
- [X] Workflow log ends with `No failures recorded — replay.tsv not written.` The input `replay.tsv` is **left in place, untouched** — a successful replay does not overwrite, archive, or empty it (`main.nf:1088–1121`).

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — startup banner"}
``` text
No failures recorded — replay.tsv not written.
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — task status (filtered)"}
``` text
LOCAL_GET_CONTIG_INFO (ce.hpc)  CACHED  7d/6d634a
BCFTOOLS_EXTRACT_STRAINS (ce.hpc)       CACHED  4d/c23af8
BCFTOOLS_RENAME_CHROMS (ce.hpc) CACHED  f8/e5812d
DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS (replay-cleanup)  COMPLETED       e5/264284
PLINK_RECODE_CV_VCF (ce.hpc_0.05)       CACHED  6b/3f9c25
PLINK_RECODE_MS_VCF (ce.hpc_0.05)       CACHED  e0/a18651
BCFTOOLS_CREATE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.hpc_0.05)   CACHED  83/979688
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.hpc_0.05)        CACHED  76/0023d8
R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (2 ce.hpc_0.05)    CACHED  ad/d81a68
R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (1 ce.hpc_0.05)    CACHED  e9/a2b055
R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (3 ce.hpc_0.05)    CACHED  4b/8bed42
R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (4 ce.hpc_0.05)    CACHED  2c/d75ff0
R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (6 ce.hpc_0.05)    CACHED  64/590013
R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (5 ce.hpc_0.05)    CACHED  08/46e17f
LOCAL_COMPILE_EIGENS (ce.hpc 0.05)      CACHED  95/1f4bb0
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_MARKER_SET (ce.hpc_0.05)     CACHED  c0/5539de
PYTHON_SIMULATE_EFFECTS_GLOBAL (5 1 gammace.hpc_0.05)   CACHED  c2/a2e9b3
GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1)  COMPLETED       42/28f4ab
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_TRAIT_DATA (ce.hpc_5_1_0.8)  COMPLETED       ea/1ea331
PLINK_UPDATE_BY_H2 (5 1 0.8 gamma ce.hpc_0.05)  COMPLETED       1a/defb88
GCTA_MAKE_GRM (5 1 0.8 gamma inbred ce.hpc_0.05)        COMPLETED       16/5d90cc
GCTA_MAKE_GRM (5 1 0.8 gamma loco ce.hpc_0.05)  COMPLETED       c9/550bc7
GCTA_PERFORM_GWA (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_nopca)     COMPLETED       00/a44f5e
GCTA_PERFORM_GWA (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)       COMPLETED       f3/9c2212
GCTA_PERFORM_GWA (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_pca) COMPLETED       35/642ad6
GCTA_PERFORM_GWA (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)       COMPLETED       ca/308e83
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GWA_TO_DB (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)   COMPLETED       d0/999bd5
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GWA_TO_DB (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_pca)     COMPLETED       80/745de6
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GWA_TO_DB (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_nopca) COMPLETED       61/194513
DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GWA_TO_DB (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)   COMPLETED       f8/5f848c
DB_MIGRATION_AGGREGATE_METADATA (aggregate)     CACHED  4a/6d5a7d
VALIDATE_REPLICATION_COMPLETE (validation)      COMPLETED       2d/962eeb
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_pca) COMPLETED       30/a173ef
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_pca) COMPLETED       1c/1f9106
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)       COMPLETED       3c/e2e05d
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)       COMPLETED       0e/333b8b
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_nopca)     COMPLETED       01/b23e22
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_nopca)     COMPLETED       59/6dd0ed
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)       COMPLETED       6c/b76750
DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)       COMPLETED       ca/f4ab28
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_pca) COMPLETED       45/561f35
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)       COMPLETED       a6/e2562e
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_pca) COMPLETED       60/02ab3c
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_nopca)     COMPLETED       81/3849fc
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_nopca)     COMPLETED       a7/de7685
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)       COMPLETED       aa/c23fc6
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)       COMPLETED       16/9c8d61
DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)       COMPLETED       f4/e94597
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — sibling-absence assertion"}
``` text
# Expected: zero rows for sibling slots
# `Replay mode:` banner reports N; total COMPLETED tasks in the producer chain should match
# N (trait) and N*4 (mapping). Paste counts here.
[paste counts here]
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — final workflow log lines"}
``` text
executor >  slurm (31)
[7d/6d634a] LOCAL_GET_CONTIG_INFO (ce.hpc)                                                [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[4d/c23af8] BCFTOOLS_EXTRACT_STRAINS (ce.hpc)                                             [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[f8/e5812d] BCFTOOLS_RENAME_CHROMS (ce.hpc)                                               [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[e0/a18651] PLINK_RECODE_MS_VCF (ce.hpc_0.05)                                             [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[6b/3f9c25] PLINK_RECODE_CV_VCF (ce.hpc_0.05)                                             [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[83/979688] BCFTOOLS_CREATE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.hpc_0.05)                                 [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[08/46e17f] R_FIND_GENOTYPE_MATRIX_EIGEN (5 ce.hpc_0.05)                                  [100%] 6 of 6, cached: 6 ✔
[95/1f4bb0] LOCAL_COMPILE_EIGENS (ce.hpc 0.05)                                            [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[c2/a2e9b3] PYTHON_SIMULATE_EFFECTS_GLOBAL (5 1 gammace.hpc_0.05)                         [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[e5/264284] DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS (replay-cleanup)                                        [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[42/28f4ab] GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1)                [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[1a/defb88] PLINK_UPDATE_BY_H2 (5 1 0.8 gamma ce.hpc_0.05)                                [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[c9/550bc7] GCTA_MAKE_GRM (5 1 0.8 gamma loco ce.hpc_0.05)                                [100%] 2 of 2 ✔
[f3/9c2212] GCTA_PERFORM_GWA (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca)             [100%] 4 of 4 ✔
[c0/5539de] DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_MARKER_SET (ce.hpc_0.05)                                   [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[76/0023d8] DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GENOTYPE_MATRIX (ce.hpc_0.05)                              [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[ea/1ea331] DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_TRAIT_DATA (ce.hpc_5_1_0.8)                                [100%] 1 of 1 ✔
[f8/5f848c] DB_MIGRATION_WRITE_GWA_TO_DB (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_inbred_pca) [100%] 4 of 4 ✔
[4a/6d5a7d] DB_MIGRATION_AGGREGATE_METADATA (aggregate)                                   [100%] 1 of 1, cached: 1 ✔
[3c/e2e05d] DB_MIGRATION_ANALYZE_QTL (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)     [100%] 8 of 8 ✔
[f4/e94597] DB_MIGRATION_ASSESS_SIMS (c_elegans_ce.hpc_0.05_5_gamma_0.8_1_loco_nopca)     [100%] 8 of 8 ✔
[2d/962eeb] VALIDATE_REPLICATION_COMPLETE (validation)                                    [100%] 1 of 1 ✔

```
:::

---

## Check 5 — DB slot cleanup: siblings preserved

::: {.callout-warning title="Skipped — no pre-replay mtime baseline captured"}
`${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes-pre.txt` was not snapshotted before kicking off the
replay (Setup S.2 was run without the `find ... > db-mtimes-pre.txt` line), so the
intended `diff` against pre-replay mtimes cannot be produced. A bimodality argument
against `T_REPLAY_START` was considered but rejected as a substitute for this gate.

**Migrated to Step 15 V8.** This check now lives in
`nemascan-sims-nf-notes/Development/error-handling/phases/phase-1/step-15/step15-plan.qmd`
as validation step V8, with two refinements vs. this section: (1) the V1
failure injection is moved from `GCTA_SIMULATE_PHENOTYPES` to a post-DB-write
module so cleanup actually has files to delete (the upstream-failure path
already covered by Step 15 V2 on 2026-05-05 only exercises idempotent-on-missing
semantics); (2) the pre-replay snapshot is captured between V1 and V2.
:::

Per slot, `db_clean_replay_slots.R` deletes **12 files**:

| Files | Path pattern |
|---|---|
| 1 trait metadata | `traits/{trait_id}.parquet` |
| 1 causal variants | `traits/causal_variants/{trait_id}_causal.parquet` |
| 1 causal genotypes | `traits/causal_genotypes/{trait_id}_causal_geno.parquet` |
| 1 phenotype | `traits/phenotypes/{trait_id}_phenotype.parquet` |
| 4 × 2 mapping files | `mappings/population={group}/mapping_id={mid}/{data,meta}.parquet` for each of the 4 `mode × pca` combos |

Run S.4 first if `STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR` is not already exported in this shell
(`echo "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR:?run S.4 first}"` to verify). Then snapshot the
post-replay mtimes and diff against the pre-replay baseline:

```bash
export STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/pr3-step13a-baseline

find "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db" -type f -printf '%T@\t%p\n' | sort > "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes-post.txt"

diff "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes-pre.txt" "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes-post.txt" > "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes.diff" || true

wc -l "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes.diff"
```

For per-slot verification, derive `trait_id` and `mapping_id` values from the replay run
using `build_ids_from_params()` (R session, sourcing `R/utils.R` / `R/database.R`) or by
reading the `meta.parquet` sidecars in the freshly-written partitions.

```bash
awk '/^[<>]/ {print $NF}' "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/db-mtimes.diff" | sed 's|.*/db/||' | cut -d/ -f1-2 | sort -u
```

Expected: only `traits/...` and `mappings/population=.../mapping_id=.../` paths;
nothing under `marker_set_metadata/`, `markers/marker_sets/`, or `markers/genotypes/`.

**Pass criteria:**

- [ ] For each replayed slot's `trait_id`, all 4 trait files exist and are non-empty (`arrow::read_parquet()` row count > 0). Their `mtime` is from the replay run, not the original.
- [ ] For each replayed slot's `trait_id`, all 4 `population={group}/mapping_id={mid}/` partitions exist with both `data.parquet` and `meta.parquet`. Their `mtime` is from the replay run.
- [ ] **Sibling rep files** (other `trait_id`s in the same `(group, maf, nqtl, effect, h2)` cell — i.e. the un-replayed `rep` values) are **untouched**: `mtime` from the original baseline.
- [ ] **Sibling cell files** (other `(nqtl, effect, h2)` cells in the same group) are also untouched.
- [ ] No `population={group}/` Hive directory was removed or emptied; only specific `mapping_id={mid}/` sub-directories had their contents replaced.
- [ ] `marker_set_metadata/`, `markers/marker_sets/`, `markers/genotypes/` are all preserved (`mtime` from the original run — these directories are never touched by `DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS`).

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — mtime diff scope"}
``` text
[paste output of the `awk | sed | cut | sort -u` block here]
```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — replayed-slot file inventory"}
``` text
1778596953.7763273140	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/markers/genotypes/87748c22b16e25eac738_genotypes.parquet
1778596967.3694115810	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/markers/marker_sets/87748c22b16e25eac738_markers.parquet
1778596967.4029393910	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/marker_set_metadata/ce.hpc_0.05_metadata.parquet
1778597073.8793229760	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/f1b019c049d723936b22.parquet
1778597073.9140688940	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/causal_variants/f1b019c049d723936b22_causal.parquet
1778597073.9239904560	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/phenotypes/f1b019c049d723936b22_phenotype.parquet
1778597074.0970917290	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/causal_genotypes/f1b019c049d723936b22_causal_geno.parquet
1778597134.0771526860	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=0e4b5bf6104460ceb364/data.parquet
1778597134.0885959190	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=5ce15e04459eaf12d093/data.parquet
1778597134.0981274400	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=6c2423205bb6d233a71d/data.parquet
1778597134.1068280060	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=456d4dab0f101168608b/data.parquet
1778597134.1175149800	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=0e4b5bf6104460ceb364/meta.parquet
1778597134.1374336730	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=5ce15e04459eaf12d093/meta.parquet
1778597134.1390443950	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=6c2423205bb6d233a71d/meta.parquet
1778597134.1476692510	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=456d4dab0f101168608b/meta.parquet
1778597148.5535575110	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings_metadata.parquet
1778598966.9006291690	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/6f8141f869e701fe79a5.parquet
1778598966.9312107310	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/causal_variants/6f8141f869e701fe79a5_causal.parquet
1778598966.9410379350	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/phenotypes/6f8141f869e701fe79a5_phenotype.parquet
1778598967.1537187120	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/traits/causal_genotypes/6f8141f869e701fe79a5_causal_geno.parquet
1778599054.1704810400	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=50b591614cee267f56ff/data.parquet
1778599054.1803251660	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=fa9398da3776f2a40bf9/data.parquet
1778599054.1818278570	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=960d430095785835f6d2/data.parquet
1778599054.1858948130	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=cbbd65cb0993b5ddd062/data.parquet
1778599054.2128177930	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=50b591614cee267f56ff/meta.parquet
1778599054.2218693530	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=fa9398da3776f2a40bf9/meta.parquet
1778599054.2297323000	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=960d430095785835f6d2/meta.parquet
1778599054.2342376000	pr3-step13a-baseline/db/mappings/population=ce.hpc/mapping_id=cbbd65cb0993b5ddd062/meta.parquet

```
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — sibling-preservation evidence"}
``` text
# Confirm sibling `trait_id`s in the same (group, maf, nqtl, effect, h2) cell still
# have their original mtimes. Confirm `marker_set_metadata/`, `markers/marker_sets/`,
# and `markers/genotypes/` are entirely absent from db-mtimes.diff.
[paste output here]
```
:::

---

## Check 6 — Successful-replay idempotency

::: {.callout-warning title="Skipped — 2026-05-12"}
Check 6 was not executed in this validation run. The pre-replay `sha256sum` / `stat`
baseline for `${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.tsv` was not captured prior to the Check 4
replay invocation, so byte-identity and `mtime`-unchanged assertions cannot be made
against a known baseline. **Not migrated to Step 15.** Operator-workflow guidance
(rename or delete `replay.tsv` between runs) is captured in the Notes section for
later inclusion in Step 16 docs.
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Scope change — 2026-05-12"}
Replay-of-replay archival (writing `replay.tsv.run-${sessionId}` and asserting all-CACHED
on a third run) was descoped in Step 13's design change (2026-05-05). This check now
verifies the absence of harmful side effects rather than archival behavior that does not
exist.
:::

After a successful replay (check 4), the input `replay.tsv` is **not** overwritten or
archived — it persists as-is on disk. Re-invoking with the same `--replay` file is an
anti-pattern: `DB_CLEAN_REPLAY_SLOTS` would re-delete the freshly rewritten files, but
Nextflow's work-dir cache would still serve the downstream producers as `CACHED`, leaving
the DB with missing files. The intended operator workflow is to delete or rename
`replay.tsv` after a successful replay.

```bash
export STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR=/vast/eande106/projects/Ryan/simulation_pipeline/nemascan-sims-nf/pr3-step13a-baseline

sha256sum "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.tsv"
stat -c '%y %n' "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.tsv"
ls -la "${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}"/replay.tsv.run-* 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "FAIL: archival files present" \
    || echo "PASS: no replay.tsv.run-* present"
```

**Pass criteria:**

- [ ] After check 4, `cat ${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}/replay.tsv` is byte-identical to the input manifest (`sha256sum` matches the Setup-time value).
- [ ] `stat -c '%y'` of `replay.tsv` is unchanged from the Setup baseline (no rewrite).
- [ ] No file matching `replay.tsv.run-*` exists in `${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}` (archival is intentionally not implemented).
- [ ] Operator workflow recorded for Step 16 docs: after a successful replay, `mv replay.tsv replay.tsv.applied.$(date +%F)` (or delete it) before any subsequent `-resume` invocation on the same output directory.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true" title="Output — sha256 / stat / archival check"}
``` text
[paste sha256sum, stat, and the PASS/FAIL line from the archival check here]
```
:::

---

## Check 7 — *(Removed)*

::: {.callout-note title="Scope change — 2026-05-12"}
The subset-invariant assertion — verifying that every slot in the output `replay.tsv`
is also present in the input `replay.tsv` — was descoped in Step 13. There is no
Groovy-side assertion in `workflow.onComplete`. The optional manual `comm` check
is retained for Step 15's forced-failure E2E and is not run here.
:::

---

## Pass Criteria

All gating checks (1–6) must pass before Step 14 begins.

| # | Check | Pass Condition | Result |
|---|-------|---------------|--------|
| 1 | Stub-run with `--replay` | No crash; parameter accepted | ✅ (local) |
| 2 | Type-coercion smoke test | Only one slot selected; no ClassCastException | ✅ (local) |
| 3 | Missing replay file guard | Clear error message, not NPE | ✅ (local) |
| 4 | Replay filter | Replayed slot re-executes; siblings filtered (absent from log, not cached); prep tasks cached; `AGGREGATE_METADATA` re-runs; validator exits 0; log line `No failures recorded — replay.tsv not written.` | [ ] |
| 5 | DB slot cleanup | 12 files per slot replaced (4 trait + 8 mapping) with new mtimes; sibling reps, sibling cells, `marker_set_metadata/`, `markers/` preserved (original mtimes) | SKIPPED — pre-replay mtime baseline not captured; re-run required |
| 6 | Successful-replay idempotency | Input `replay.tsv` byte-identical and `mtime`-unchanged after success; no archival file produced; operator workflow documented for Step 16 | SKIPPED — no pre-replay sha256/stat baseline captured; not migrated to Step 15 |

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 6 gating checks (1–6) pass
- [ ] Post-replay DB directory saved for Step 14 unit test fixture collection
  - Path on Rockfish: `${STEP13A_OUTPUT_DIR}` (e.g. `/scratch4/eande106/<user>/pr3-step13a-baseline`)
- [ ] Step 13a marked complete in step-tracker

---

## Implementation Notes

**Date:** 2026-05-12
**NF version on Rockfish:**
**PR3 HEAD tested:** `946f730` (or `38f0fed` with test-suite update)
**Baseline output directory:** `/scratch4/eande106/<user>/pr3-step13a-baseline`

| Check | Result | Notes |
|-------|--------|-------|
| 1 Stub-run with `--replay` | ✅ (local) | V1–V4 in pr3-local-validation-results.md |
| 2 Type-coercion smoke test | ✅ (local) | V1 (1-slot fixture); V12 (replay profile) |
| 3 Missing replay file guard | ✅ (local) | V2/V3/V4 — header + column + row tokenization errors |
| Setup Baseline run | | |
| 4 Replay filter (Rockfish) | | |
| 5 DB slot cleanup (Rockfish) | SKIPPED | `db-mtimes-pre.txt` not captured before replay (Setup S.2 omitted the snapshot); deferred to a re-run |
| 6 Successful-replay idempotency (Rockfish) | SKIPPED | No pre-replay `sha256sum` / `stat` baseline captured for `replay.tsv`; operator-workflow note only. Not migrated to Step 15. |

---

## Notes

<!-- Record any deviations from the plan, unexpected behavior, or follow-ups. -->
